title: Phase 3.5e: Streaming & Polish
body:
## Parent Epic
#173

## Summary

UX improvements and streaming support for MCP review tools.

## Features

### Streaming Findings via MCP

Use MCP progress notifications to emit findings as each reviewer completes:

```
[Reviewer: security] Finding 1 of 3...
[Reviewer: security] Finding 2 of 3...
[Reviewer: maintainability] Finding 1 of 2...
...
Review complete. 7 findings from 3 reviewers.
```

This allows the coding assistant to start presenting findings while other reviewers are still running.

### Session Auto-Prune

Automatically prune stale sessions when running reviews:
- Sessions older than configurable threshold (default: 30 days)
- Sessions for deleted branches

### TUI Refinements

Based on usage feedback:
- Keyboard shortcut hints
- Color theme options
- Performance optimizations for large finding sets

## Deliverables

- [ ] MCP progress notifications for streaming
- [ ] Session auto-prune on review
- [ ] TUI refinements (TBD based on 3.5c feedback)
- [ ] Documentation updates

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] MCP clients see incremental progress during review
- [ ] Stale sessions cleaned automatically
- [ ] TUI feels polished and responsive
